title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Perona, Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Perona, Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Zombies have a weak point, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Well, please return to your master!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Commanding officer!!! The commanding officer was defeated!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We need to inform the master !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Strawhat and the others were kidnapped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, but... where should I start?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ____ Anyways, please listen without fooling around.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I was lured onto this thriller bark,

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Just like you ladies and gentlemen ...

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Perona, Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.
